name: CONCENTRATION
author: Shialaxy
description: A former Top 1 that has sparked a lot of debate, whether this level was harder than Unnerfed DS End. Very likely inspired by the upcoming Top 1 Heliopolis. Due to bugged percentages in the level, note that to get the list requirement percentage, you need to have the mod Percentage Toggle installed on Geode and then click on 2.1 in the bottom left.
